W^T.ft.704 (3?),cTRR§2&-10-1999 26. ^l.^lf%.814(3?),WR§ J6-12-1999 27. m^)lR 169 C3T),?n^Sr 12-3-2001 2a mm.K 100 (3?), mm 11-2-2003 29. m^tft: 290 (3?), mm 16-4-2008 -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 9th October, 2009 G.S.R. 738 (E).--Whereas the Central Government is satisfied that 'Fixed Dose Combinations of Corticosteroids with any other drug for systemic use: is likely to involve risk to human beings; And whereas, the Central Government is satisfied that it ks necessary and expedient to prohibit the manufacture, sale and distribution of the said fixed dose combination in the public interest; Now therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 26A of the Drugs and Cosmetic Act. i 940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare number G.S.R. 578(E), dated the23rd July, 1983, namely:— In the Table appended to the said notification, for item 14 and entries relating thereto , the following item and entries shall be substituted , namely:— "14. Fixed Dose combination of corticosteroid with any other drug for internal use except for preparations meant for meter dose inhalers and dry powder inhalers." [F. No. X-! 1014/5 2007-DFQC j DEBAS1SH PANDA, Jl. Secy. Note :—The principal notification was published vide number G.S.R. 578(E), dated the 23rd July, 1983 in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) and subsequently amended vide: - 1.
